tableRow.maxContractTerm: 5 years (continuing pupil-transportation services contract, Cal. Educ. Code §39803(a)); 5 years for schoolbus lease/rental, or up to 10 years if the lease gives the district an annual option to purchase or cancel (§39803(b)); 15 years for zero-emission services contracts and up to 20 years for zero-emission bus leases with annual purchase/cancel option (§39803.5).
tableRow.rebidRequired: Conditional. At term-end the district may either (i) jointly renew the existing contract with the incumbent under §39803(a), or (ii) procure a new contract. Competitive bidding under §39802 is mandatory only when a NEW transportation contract with a non-exempt party exceeds $10,000; in that case bids are taken pursuant to Pub. Contract Code §§20111-20112, and the board may award to other than the lowest bidder.
tableRow.renewalMechanics: Joint renewal at term-end expressly authorized: renewal is at the option of the district and contractor, jointly, and the renewed contract carries forward all prior terms including built-in rate-increase provisions (§39803(a)). In-term annual renegotiation permitted when economic factors require it, subject to mutual approval (§39803(c)). Each renewal is a new term subject to the §39803(a) 5-year cap (or §39803.5 15-year cap). No automatic/evergreen rollover.
tableRow.statutoryCitation: Cal. Educ. Code §§39800, 39802, 39803, 39803.5; Cal. Pub. Contract Code §§20111-20112; Cal. Educ. Code §17450 et seq.
tableRow.districtVariance: Unknown. No statewide-uniformity directive (CDE bulletin, on-point AG opinion, State Auditor report, CSBA directive) and no documented cross-district interpretive divergence on §§39802/39803 located within search budget.
